doc_content.summary: Aggregates performance metrics across all stark skill runs, generating agent scorecards, trend analysis, and actionable recommendations based on code review history.
key_features: Cross-run metric aggregation and trend tracking
Interactive recommendation prompts for continuous improvement
Meta-observations for tracking prompt efficacy and failure rates
JSON output support for programmatic analysis

alt_text: Usage visualization for the stark-metrics skill showing the invocation arguments, execution flow, interactive recommendation handling, and common failure modes.
